## Verification

<!-- What did you run or manually test? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I opened or linked an issue before this PR.
- [ ] I kept the PR focused and explained why the change is needed.
- [ ] I updated docs/tests when behavior or public API changed.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, proprietary code, customer data, or decompiled source.
- [ ] I reported security-sensitive issues privately instead of in this PR.
